STILLGROVE · Trend → Bonsai Wall Art Catalog

Trending products in comparable markets, translated into sellable fake-bonsai wall art. 16 of 32 rendered (studio + in-room) · 16 render-pending.

01

Garden Window Arched Moss Panel

$345-$445 · ~74% (hero)
Based on Crittall-style arched window mirror (stepped/arched mirror)
Mirrors & wall decorMirrors
Design details
Inspiration · the trendArched windowpane mirror, black framephoto: Pexels

Design DNA borrowed: Arch silhouette + black grid muntins = the illusion of a real window/view.

STILLGROVE piece: Arch-topped frame with a thin black Crittall-style grid laid over a preserved-moss and sculptural bonsai-branch scene — like looking through a window into a Japanese garden.

Materials: Light-oak arched frame, black metal muntin grid, preserved reindeer + sheet moss, sculptural bonsai branch

Size: 24×36 in (arched portrait)  ·  Source price: $120-$400

Why it's trending: Arched mirrors are a top 2026 wall trend; stone-toned arched/chunky-framed mirrors read 'like a doorway carved into the wall' and feel instantly elevated.

sourcesource

Ripple Wavy-Frame Moss Tondo

$195-$295 · ~72%
Based on Gustaf Westman-style chunky wavy mirror (Gen-Z viral)
Mirrors & decorative objectsMirrors
Design details
Inspiration · the trendWavy-edged decorative mirrorphoto: Pexels

Design DNA borrowed: Thick, glossy, playful wavy/blob frame in a bold-but-tonal color.

STILLGROVE piece: A round moss and miniature-bonsai piece set in a thick, glossy, wavy-edged frame in soft sage lacquer or natural oak — playful silhouette, calm tonal palette.

Materials: Chunky wavy frame (sage lacquer or oak), circular preserved cushion moss, miniature bonsai branch

Size: 24 in round  ·  Source price: $90-$250

Why it's trending: Wavy/asymmetrical mirrors 'read like art'; chunky, playful wavy frames are a viral Gen-Z look now treated as timeless.

Moonglow Backlit Bonsai Panel

Based on TikTok mushroom lamp / backlit mood light
Lighting & ambient decorLighting
Design details
Inspiration · the trendGlowing mushroom table lampphoto: Unsplash

Design DNA borrowed: Warm ambient glow + a rounded glowing disc behind the subject.

STILLGROVE piece: A shadow-box panel with a bonsai silhouette and moss in front of a warm-LED-backlit frosted moon disc — a soft halo glow for evening ambience.

Materials: Deep walnut shadow box, frosted acrylic moon disc, warm-white LED, preserved moss, sculptural bonsai branch

Size: 20×28 in  ·  Source price: $25-$120

Why it's trending: Mushroom lamps went from flea-market find to TikTok obsession; under-$30 mood lights go viral because they look stunning on camera, and backlit wall art is an emerging 2026 trend.

Design details
Inspiration · the trendUndulating carved-wood wallphoto: Pexels

Design DNA borrowed: Flowing carved-wood slat waves = movement and flow.

STILLGROVE piece: Horizontal carved light-oak wave slats forming a flowing dune, with a cascade-style windswept bonsai branch and moss riding the crest — motion meets nature.

Materials: Carved oak wave slats, preserved moss, cascade-style bonsai branch

Size: 24×36 in (landscape)  ·  Source price: $150-$600

Why it's trending: Wave wall sculpture is 'one of the most captivating trends in modern interiors'; carved wooden waves highlight grain and a sense of motion.

STILLGROVE — generated from the Trend → Bonsai tracker. Render toggle on each card switches studio ⇄ in-room. Prices are target retail bands; margins from the plan.
